entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: An approach to managing watershed resources in an integrated manner to achieve sustainable development.

entities.name: COMPREHENSIVE ASSESSMENT OF WATERSHED PROGRAMS IN INDIA
entities.description: A systematic evaluation of watershed programs implemented across India to identify best-bet options.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the watershed programs were assessed.

entities.name: DEPARTMENT OF LAND RESOURCES
entities.description: A government department that provided financial assistance for the assessment.

entities.name: MINISTRY OF RURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: A government ministry that provided financial assistance for the assessment.

entities.name: MINISTRY OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A government ministry that provided financial assistance for the assessment.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which provided communication and editorial support.
